metadata.description: Automated security scanning and comprehensive static security review for Claude Code. Combines 12 tools (Bandit, Semgrep, Trivy, TruffleHog, Gitleaks, CodeQL, mcps-audit, OSV-Scanner, mcp-scan, security-audit, skill-security-auditor, mcp-exfil-scan) with a senior AppSec agent covering 12 vulnerability categories.

plugins.name: claude-code-security-plugins
plugins.description: Automated security scanning (Bandit, Semgrep, Trivy, TruffleHog, Gitleaks, CodeQL, mcps-audit, OSV-Scanner, mcp-scan, mcp-exfil-scan) and comprehensive static security review agent for Claude Code
